creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Dan,

there hasn't been any activity on this PR for sysutils/bacula-server (see
[1]) for quite a while. What is the state of things here? Should a change
be committed, or should this PR be closed?

(Note: The change proposed by Michael wasn't to use /etc, which would
indeed not be correct, but to use /usr/local/etc/bacula, which would be
acceptable. I am not expressing any preference myself, though - it's the
maintainer's decision.)

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170882
